tasks.label: Start Local OpenAI Proxy
args: $projectRoot = 'D:\start_track\must_startrack'; Set-Location (Join-Path $projectRoot 'functions'); $env:OPENAI_API_KEY = (Get-Content (Join-Path $projectRoot 'Open API.txt') -Raw).Trim(); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($env:OPENAI_API_KEY)) { throw 'Open API.txt is empty'; }; node .\local-proxy.js

background.endsPattern: Local OpenAI proxy listening on http://127.0.0.1:8787/openAiRerank
